description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows that triggers on push to specific paths, on pull requests to those paths, and on published releases. Run a matrix job across different Windows environments, compilers, and configurations. For each job, check out the repository, set up ccache, and then configure and build the project using CMake, with different steps for MSVC, ClangCL, MinGW, and Clang. Compile dependencies, the OSP-Magnum project, and unit tests, then run the unit tests and upload the build artifacts.
